message:
fix(checksums): update uv installer SHA256

uv upstream updated their install.sh script. Update checksum to match:
e10ae0dcd7b12acc506b3fee059f1eddd3288e277d9bdf657dd0261f574f53b4

Closes #111

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,7 +60,7 @@ installers:
 
   uv:
     url: "https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh"
-    sha256: "9e1128954fd0cb60e1a4ce6f52528a2cdd525f724edff5b8c3e06a71b385aa25"
+    sha256: "e10ae0dcd7b12acc506b3fee059f1eddd3288e277d9bdf657dd0261f574f53b4"
 
   pt:
     url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/process_triage/master/install.sh"
